title: Eremolaena rotundifolia
taxonomy: Eremolaena rotundifolia is a plant species within the family Sarcolenaceae. This plant is native to Madagascar, a country located off the coast of East Africa. The classification of Eremolaena rotundifolia is still a topic of ongoing research and study in the field of botany. Further classification and taxonomic information are required to fully understand the plant's position within the botanical hierarchy. It is considered an endangered species due to habitat loss and degradation.
